name: Kubernetes CronJob/Job Modification
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: kelnage
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes CronJob/Job Modification
SIGMA Description: Detects when a Kubernetes CronJob or Job is created or modified.
A Kubernetes Job creates one or more pods to accomplish a specific task, and a CronJob creates Jobs on a recurring schedule.
An adversary can take advantage of this Kubernetes object to schedule Jobs to run containers that execute malicious code within a cluster, allowing them to achieve persistence.


False positives:
- Modifying a Kubernetes Job or CronJob may need to be done by a system administrator.
- Automated processes may need to take these actions and may need to be filtered.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%batch%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cronjobs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%jobs%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes CronJob/Job Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%batch%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cronjobs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%jobs%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
